headline: Adobe MLB Expansion Puts AI Tools And Valuation In Focus
summary: Adobe expanded its partnership with Major League Baseball to roll out AI powered creative and marketing tools across the league. The collaboration focuses on digital fan engagement, content personalization, and marketing workflows for MLB and its clubs. The deal aims to let millions of fans customize digital content tied to MLB events and teams. For investors watching Adobe, ticker NasdaqGS:ADBE, this agreement highlights how its enterprise solutions are being used in high profile sports...

headline: Adobe and Major League Baseball Expand Partnership to Power Next Generation Digital Fan Experiences
summary: SAN JOSE, Calif. & NEW YORK, March 09, 2026--Adobe (Nasdaq:ADBE)—the global technology leader that unleashes creativity, productivity and customer experiences through innovative tools and platforms—and Major League Baseball (MLB), North America’s most historic professional sports league, today announced a major expansion of their multi-year partnership. To drive the next generation of digital fan experiences, Adobe is providing industry-leading solutions for MLB’s marketing, product and content

headline: Why Surging Oil Prices Are Fueling Inflation Fears
summary: In this episode of WSJ’s Take On the Week, we discuss why a surge in oil prices is fueling fresh inflation fears, and how the potential for a supply shock could tie the Federal Reserve’s hands on interest-rate cuts.

raw.headline: Why Surging Oil Prices Are Fueling Inflation Fears
